## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss SEO progress, content strategy, and technical challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Indexing issues detected: Site map submitted but URLs not indexed; team to investigate and resubmit URLs in the correct GSC profile](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Positive organic traffic growth: 13% increase in the past week and a half, with potential for further growth](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Content workflow refined: New streamlined process for content review and publication established](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Content strategy adjustment: Shift towards featuring complementary tools rather than direct competitors in comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO Challenges

  - [Indexing issues detected despite sitemap submission on January 2nd](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Discrepancy between two Google Search Console (GSC) profiles (HTTP vs HTTPS)](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Team to investigate:](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
      - [Resubmit URLs in the correct GSC profile (HTTPS version)](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
      - [Analyze differences between GSC profiles](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [Check Google Analytics for session data on affected pages](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
      - [Perform manual content checks for potential issues](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

### Organic Traffic Performance

  - [13% increase in organic traffic over the past 1.5 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [SEMrush data suggests potential for even higher growth](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [New demo lead from construction company (300 employees) via Google search](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Increasing breadth of ranking keywords, positive indicator for future growth](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)

### Content Production and Workflow

  - [Current status: 15 articles live, 5 ready to publish, 5 new ones for review](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [New streamlined workflow:](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
    1.  Wednesday: New content delivered
    2.  Thursday: Yourco team reviews and provides comments
    3.  Friday: GrowthX reflects changes
    4.  Monday: Final review and staging for publication
  - [Aim to reduce feedback rounds and maintain publishing velocity](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustment

  - [Discussion on featuring competitors vs. complementary tools in comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Decision: Focus on complementary tools (e.g., Culture Amp, Nectar, Bonusly) rather than direct competitors](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [Consider positioning mobile app solutions separately to differentiate Yourco's SMS-based approach](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Resubmit URLs in the correct GSC profile (HTTPS version) as top priority](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Investigate and resolve indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Implement new content review and publication workflow](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Schedule a separate 20-minute session to discuss SEO attribution tracking options](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)
  - [Continue refining content strategy to balance SEO value and competitive positioning](https://fathom.video/share/fKucysHBsKQ2DYGBVzsexFayJxjAgLzG?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
